mapper.sql: sp.id, sp.page_code, sp.page_title, sp.content, sp.is_published, sp.template_code, sp.created_at, sp.created_by, sp.updated_at, sp.updated_by, sp.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , cu.name AS created_by_name, uu.name AS updated_by_name FROM site_page sp LEFT JOIN `user` cu ON sp.created_by = cu.id AND cu.deleted = false LEFT JOIN `user` uu ON sp.updated_by = uu.id AND uu.deleted = false WHERE sp.deleted = false ORDER BY sp.id DESC

SELECT , cu.name AS created_by_name, uu.name AS updated_by_name FROM site_page sp LEFT JOIN `user` cu ON sp.created_by = cu.id AND cu.deleted = false LEFT JOIN `user` uu ON sp.updated_by = uu.id AND uu.deleted = false WHERE sp.deleted = false AND sp.is_published = true ORDER BY sp.id DESC

SELECT , cu.name AS created_by_name, uu.name AS updated_by_name FROM site_page sp LEFT JOIN `user` cu ON sp.created_by = cu.id AND cu.deleted = false LEFT JOIN `user` uu ON sp.updated_by = uu.id AND uu.deleted = false WHERE sp.deleted = false AND sp.id = #{id}

SELECT , cu.name AS created_by_name, uu.name AS updated_by_name FROM site_page sp LEFT JOIN `user` cu ON sp.created_by = cu.id AND cu.deleted = false LEFT JOIN `user` uu ON sp.updated_by = uu.id AND uu.deleted = false WHERE sp.deleted = false AND sp.page_code = #{pageCode} AND sp.is_published = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_page ( page_code, page_title, content, is_published, template_code, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{pageCode}, #{pageTitle}, #{content}, #{isPublished}, #{templateCode}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, false )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_page SET page_title = #{pageTitle}, content = #{content}, is_published = #{isPublished}, template_code = #{templateCode}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu WHERE deleted = false AND page_id = #{pageId}
